# This function filters a MAF dataframe by retaining (or discarding) truncating mutations

`filter_maf_truncating()` takes a maf file and filters a MAF dataframe
by retaining only the rows with a column value included in the values
list

## Usage

``` r
filter_maf_truncating(maf, schema = TCGA_maf_schema, ...)
```

## Arguments

- maf:

  a maf as dataframe

- schema:

  a schema of datafrane check Select::TCGA_maf_schema for example

- ...:

  Other options

## Value

filtered_maf a filtered maf file

## Examples

``` r
data(luad_maf, package = "SelectSim")
filter_maf_truncating(luad_maf)
#>        Chromosome Start_Position End_Position   Hugo_Symbol
```
